name: Botkeeper
tagline: AI-assisted bookkeeping combining machine learning with human review
description:
Botkeeper is an automated bookkeeping service that combines specialized software with human oversight. It manages the core, repetitive tasks of bookkeeping—such as importing and categorizing transactions, reconciling bank and credit card accounts, and generating key financial statements—while a team of skilled accountants reviews complex entries and ensures accuracy. This hybrid model is designed to reduce manual work and increase reliability.

Key features include its intelligent transaction categorization, which learns from your business and accountant corrections over time, and its always-on financial dashboard that provides real-time visibility into your cash flow, profit and loss, and other metrics. The platform also automates accounts payable and receivable tracking. It integrates with major accounting software like QuickBooks Online and Xero, as well as payment processors and banks.

Botkeeper is built for accounting firms that need to scale their client services without proportionally increasing staff, and for growing businesses (like SaaS companies, professional services, or e-commerce) that require consistent, accurate books but aren't ready for a full-time, in-house controller. The main benefit is receiving dependable, scalable bookkeeping that minimizes errors and frees up time for strategic financial analysis.

A typical use case is a marketing agency using Botkeeper to automatically sync and categorize expenses from multiple ad platforms and corporate cards. The owner receives a weekly financial package, while their external CPA firm has secure, organized access to all reconciled data for tax preparation, streamlining the entire financial workflow.
pros: Hybrid AI + human approach ensures accuracy
